---
title: "Aulas da disciplina"
subtitle: "PPEC0039 — Estatística e Planejamento de Experimentos"
page-layout: full

listing:
  contents:
    - "Notebooks/*.ipynb"

  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: 250px
  grid-item-border: false

  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - description

  categories: false
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  page-size: 9
---
